narrative:
Newark 5-B (precinct in Licking County) has 1,292 registered voters, with 50.6% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 35.4% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 13.9%, a pronounced Republican lean of 21.5 percentage points.
